articles.title: Founders seize on Indian court ruling to revive criticism of Google’s ad business
articles.description: The ruling drew support from founders, while lawyers said it could force platforms to revisit how they handle trademarked keywords.
articles.author: Jagmeet Singh

articles.title: I went to the so-called ‘steroid Olympics,’ to understand why Silicon Valley is obsessed with peptides
articles.description: The Enhanced Games — a singular sporting competition where a majority of the athletes were on performance enhancing drugs — may herald a new business
articles.author: Lucas Ropek
